user.title: Rain Radar
user.description: Set up rain radar and automation-ready rain sensors using MET Norway data.

data_description.contact: MET Norway requires a contact string in API requests. Use an email address or website URL where you can be reached.
data_description.rain_threshold: Precipitation rate in mm/h used for raining now and rain soon.
data_description.rain_soon_window: Forecast window in minutes used by the rain soon binary sensor.
data_description.sample_radius_m: Reserved for provider sampling strategies. MET Norway point forecasts are used in the first release.
data_description.rain_risk_horizon_hours: The default 12-hour horizon preserves MET Rain Risk behavior.

reload_notice.title: Finish setup
reload_notice.description: Rain Radar will install and register the bundled dashboard card automatically. After the integration is added or updated, reload your browser once if the card is not visible immediately.

abort.already_configured: This provider and location are already configured.
abort.unknown: The setup flow was interrupted. Start setup again.

error.unsupported_provider: This provider is not supported yet.
error.invalid_contact: Enter an email address or website URL so MET Norway can contact you if needed.
error.invalid_rain_threshold: Rain threshold must be zero or higher.
error.invalid_rain_soon_window: Rain soon window must be between 5 and 120 minutes.
error.invalid_sample_radius: Sampling radius must be between 0 and 10000 meters.
error.invalid_rain_risk_horizon: Rain risk horizon must be between 1 and 24 hours.

init.title: Rain Radar options
init.description: Update provider, location, contact, and rain thresholds.
